{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Queen Cynara the Second
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen Cynara the Second]] was involved in raising the walls of [[Cana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Cynara]] the Second was a [[Queen of Damasca]] who remained alive to seal the other eight [[Incarnations]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
